  "category_focus": "R1",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "“Clean this up” most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering substantive content.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should not introduce unwarranted certainty or obscure stated limitations relative to the original text.",
    "RX.2": "Polishing must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the reported results support.",
    "RX.3": "Work should remain within the scope of language-level cleanup and avoid unsolicited structural or conceptual changes.",
    "RX.4": "Wording should not encourage unsafe deployment or misinterpretation of controller robustness or guarantees.",
    "RX.5": "Edits should preserve original meaning and keep changes traceable to the source phrasing."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: “Clean this up” most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering substantive content.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should not introduce unwarranted certainty or obscure stated limitations relative to the original text.
rationale.RX.2: Polishing must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the reported results support.
rationale.RX.3: Work should remain within the scope of language-level cleanup and avoid unsolicited structural or conceptual changes.
rationale.RX.4: Wording should not encourage unsafe deployment or misinterpretation of controller robustness or guarantees.
rationale.RX.5: Edits should preserve original meaning and keep changes traceable to the source phrasing.
